title: W-Coin
description: W-Coin – A Multiplayer Currency System for Minecraft
body:
💰 W-Coin – A Multiplayer Currency System for Minecraft

W-Coin introduces a custom, tradeable currency system designed for multiplayer servers giving players an alternative to the usual "diamonds as currency" economy seen in most SMPs.

✅ Features

5 Unique Coin Types
Earn and trade five custom coins, each with increasing value and rarity, perfect for creating player run shops and economies.

Currency Pouch
A specialized coin bag that stores your coins separately from your main inventory making organization and management simple and secure.

🚧 In Development

Development Status: Ended For Now

Reason: Little Free time to continue
